name.ja: <ruby>破<rt>は</rt></ruby><ruby>械<rt>かい</rt></ruby><ruby>冥<rt>めい</rt></ruby><ruby>官<rt>かん</rt></ruby>カムラ

text.en:
You can target up to 3 cards you control; destroy them, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can apply any of the following effects, in sequence, based on the original types of the destroyed cards.
● Monster: Draw 1 card.
● Spell: Change the battle position of 1 monster on the field.
● Trap: Destroy 1 other card on the field.
If this card on the field is destroyed by card effect: You can destroy all monsters on the field. You can only use each effect of "Unchained Malevolent Magistrate Kamura" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：以自己场上最多3张卡为对象可以发动。将该卡破坏，从手牌将此卡特殊召唤。然后，根据所破坏的卡的原本的种类，可分别适用以下效果。●怪兽：自己抽1张。●魔法：变更场上的1只怪兽的表示形式。●陷阱：将场上的1张其他卡破坏。②：场上的此卡因效果被破坏的情况下可以发动。将场上的怪兽全部破坏。
